attributes.name: @axis
attributes.summary: Axis argument for reductions and softmax.

attributes.name: @default
attributes.summary: Default value for params and generated modulation helpers.

attributes.name: @generated-for
attributes.summary: Associates a generated helper parameter with a user parameter.

attributes.name: @hidden
attributes.summary: Hide a generated or internal parameter from normal host presentation.

attributes.name: @mod-depth-max
attributes.summary: Upper bound for generated modulation depth control.

attributes.name: @mod-depth-min
attributes.summary: Lower bound for generated modulation depth control.

attributes.name: @mod-mode
attributes.summary: Modulation mode: additive, multiplicative, or semitone.

attributes.name: @modulator
attributes.summary: Marks an input as a modulation source slot.

examples.name: dx7-4op
examples.preview:
(def gate     (in 1  @name gate))
(def pitch    (in 2  @name pitch))
(def velocity (in 3  @name velocity))
(def trigger  (in 4  @name trigger))
(def mod1     (in 5  @name mod1 @modulator 1))
(def mod2     (in 6  @name mod2 @modulator 2))

examples.name: MODUM_DELAY
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def lfo (cos (* twopi (triangle (phasor (param rate @min 0.1 @max 100 @default 1) ) 0.2 ))))
(def x
  (biquad
    input
    (+ (* (scale lfo -1 1 0 1) 100) (param cutoff @min 50 @max 4000 @default 900))

examples.name: dualdelaymod
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def lfo (cos (* twopi (triangle (phasor (param lforate @min 0.1 @max 32 @default 1))))))
(def x
  (biquad
    input
    (+ (* (scale lfo -1 1 0 1) 1000) (param cutoff @min 50 @max 4000 @default 900))

examples.name: filter
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def x (biquad input (param cutoff @min 50 @max 8000 @default 50) (param res @min 1 @max 64 @default 4) 1 1))
(out x 1 @name audio)

examples.name: gater
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def m (triangle (phasor 8) .9))
(out (* m input) 1 @name audio)

examples.name: lowdcmp
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(out (compressor (* 4 input) 12 (param threshold @min -40 @max 0 @default -10) 5 0.1 0.1) 1 @name audio)

examples.name: lower
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(out (* (param vol @default 0.05 @min 0 @max .2) input) 1 @name audio)

examples.name: lower2
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(out (* .25 input) 1 @name audio)

examples.name: mfilt
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def cmod (scale (triangle (phasor (param freq @min .5 @max 128 @default 2)) .03) 0 1 50 500))
(out (biquad input cmod (param res @min 1 @max 9 @default 2) 1 1) 1 @name audio)

examples.name: mod_delay
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(make-history h)
(def fin (read-history h))
(def freq (param freq @min 0.1 @max 500 @default 32))
(def dmax (param delay_max @min 50 @max 5000 @default 100))
(def delaytime (scale (triangle (phasor freq) 0.2) 0 1 50 dmax))

examples.name: nothing
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def x (biquad input (param cutoff @min 50 @max 4000 @default 1000) (param res @min 1 @max 16 @default 4) 1 1))
(out x 1 @name audio)

examples.name: sidechain
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def side (in 2 @name signal @modulator 1))
(param threshold @min -80 @max -2 @default -20)
(param ratio min 1 @max 20 @default 10)
(def o (compressor input ratio threshold 6 .01 .01 1 side))
(out o 1 @name audio)

examples.name: tinytest
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def x (biquad input (param cutoff @min 50 @max 4000 @default 50) (param res @min 1 @max 16 @default 4) 1 1))
(out (* x 0) 1 @name audio)

examples.name: untitled
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def lfo (cos (* twopi (triangle (phasor 2)))))
(def x
  (biquad
    input
    (+ (* (scale lfo -1 1 0 1) 1000) (param cutoff @min 50 @max 4000 @default 900))

examples.name: wut
examples.preview:
(def input (in 1 @name signal))
(def x (biquad input (param cutoff @min 50 @max 4000 @default 3000) (param res @min 1 @max 16 @default 4) 1 1))
(out x 1 @name audio)

notes: Modulatable params require at least one input marked with @modulator.
Generated modulation source and depth params are hidden host parameters.

operators.summary: Multiply two values. The parser rewrites n-ary forms into nested binary calls.
Add two values. The parser rewrites n-ary forms into nested binary calls.
Negate one value or subtract two values.
Divide two values. The parser rewrites n-ary forms into nested binary calls.

operators.name: accum
operators.summary: Accumulator with optional reset and bounds.

operators.name: compressor
signatures: (compressor signal ratio threshold knee attack release)
(compressor signal ratio threshold knee attack release sidechain)
(compressor signal ratio threshold knee attack release isSidechain sidechain)
operators.summary: Dynamics compressor with optional sidechain forms.

operators.name: delay
operators.summary: Delay by a time in samples.

operators.name: fft
operators.summary: FFT returning the real component and exposing imag in `__fft_im`.

operators.name: ifft
operators.summary: Inverse FFT from real and imaginary parts.

operators.name: max
operators.summary: Maximum. The parser rewrites n-ary forms into nested binary calls.

operators.name: min
operators.summary: Minimum. The parser rewrites n-ary forms into nested binary calls.

operators.name: overlap-add
operators.summary: Scatter-add a signalTensor into an output signal.

operators.name: peek
operators.summary: Read a scalar from a tensor.

operators.name: peek-row
operators.summary: Read a tensor row as a signalTensor.

operators.name: ramp2trig
operators.summary: Convert a ramp wrap into a trigger.

operators.name: sample
operators.summary: Interpolated row read from a tensor.

operators.name: to-signal
operators.summary: Convert a 1D tensor into a signal playback source.

operators.name: triangle
operators.summary: Convert a 0..1 phase to a -1..1 triangle.

special_forms.name: def
special_forms.summary: Bind a symbol to the last evaluated body expression.

special_forms.name: defmacro
special_forms.summary: Define a macro with hygienic local `def` and `make-history` scoping.

special_forms.name: make-history
special_forms.summary: Create a history cell for feedback.

special_forms.name: read-history
special_forms.summary: Read the previous frame from a history cell.

special_forms.name: write-history
special_forms.summary: Write the current frame to a history cell and return the written signal.

special_forms.name: mod
special_forms.summary: Resolve the lowered modulated value for a parameter declared with `@mod true`.
